name: the gate rejects a copyleft (GPL) license on bundled / redistributed data
command: mkdir -p vendor/canonical-vocabulary rubric/runners && printf '%s' '{"mirrors":{"bad.json":{"license":"GPL-3.0"}}}' > vendor/canonical-vocabulary/provenance.json && printf '%s' '{"tools":[]}' > rubric/runners/toolchain.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'surface=bundled-vocabulary' e.txt && echo bundled-gpl-rejected 1>&2
